query:
-- Create a Voice/UCaaS service for Caravan and RV Works (C0054) - they have voice items in DataGate but no voice service
INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, status, customerExternalId, customerName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, supplierName)
VALUES ('DG-C0054-VOICE', 'Voice', 'UCaaS', 'BroadSoft UCaaS Bundle', 'active', 'C0054', 'Caravan and RV Works', 0, 0, 'DataGate');

-- Match all Caravan and RV Works voice items to the new service
UPDATE billing_items 
SET serviceExternalId = 'DG-C0054-VOICE', matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'high'
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND customerExternalId = 'C0054'
AND description NOT LIKE '%NBN%';

-- CF Aust (C0058) - has 2 unmatched "Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 12 Months" items (no AVC code)
-- Check what NBN services exist for C0058
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceTypeDetail FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0058' AND s.serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Data') AND s.status = 'active';
